goal: Create all 10 .claude/agents/*.md subagent definition files with tiered model routing, persistent memory, and skill preloading

tasks.name: Create haiku-tier agents (explorer, docs-writer)
tasks.action: Create 2 fast lightweight agents with model: haiku, no memory (explorer) or no memory (docs-writer), appropriate tool restrictions and system prompts

tasks.name: Create sonnet-tier agents (code-reviewer, security-scanner, perf-analyzer, api-reviewer)
tasks.action: Create 4 analytical agents with model: sonnet, memory: project, read-only tools + Bash, and relevant skill preloading

tasks.name: Create inherit-tier agents (test-writer, debugger, refactorer, migrate)
tasks.action: Create 4 implementation agents with model: inherit, memory: project, full read-write tools, and relevant skill preloading
